zh.lifeSummary: 當William Hancock III於1640年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州素利時，他的父親William Hancock II19歲，母親Elizabeth Spencer20歲。他於1668年與Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1677年在美國維吉尼亞州易斯爾 本 懷特勞也斯 可可 帕里什享年37歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Hancock III于1640年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州素利时，他的父亲William Hancock II19岁，母亲Elizabeth Spencer20岁。他于1668年与Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1677年在美国弗吉尼亚州易斯爾 本 懷特勞也斯 可可 帕里什享年37岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可。

nameMeanings.name: Hancock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hann + the hypocoristic suffix -cok, which was commonly added to personal names (see Cocke ).
Dutch: from Middle Dutch hanecoc ‘winkle, periwinkle’ (a type of shellfish), probably a metonymic occupational name for someone who gathered and sold shellfish.

History: Thomas Hancock, the uncle of Declaration of Independence signatory John Hancock (1736/7–93), was among the foremost of 18th-century American businessmen. He was a descendant of Nathaniel Hancock, who was known to have been in Cambridge, MA, as early as 1634. Born in Braintree, MA, John Hancock was president of the Second Continental Congress and the first governor of the state of MA.

variants.name: Hancox
meanings: English: variant of Hancock , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Handcock
meanings: English: variant of Hancock with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hann
meanings: German and Dutch: from a shortened pet form of the personal name Johann (see John ).

English: from the Middle English personal name Hann, commonly a pet form of Henry (Middle English Hanry). Hann could also be a rhyming pet form of Randolph (Middle English Randal, shortened to Ran or Rand). Han was also a pet form of Joh(a)n in Middle Dutch, and it is possible that this usage was brought to England by Flemings after the Norman Conquest, but no evidence has yet been found that it was similarly used in Middle English. See Henry and Randall , and compare Hankin , Hancock , and Hanks .
English: variant of Ann with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Hancock III was born in 1640, in Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, William Hancock II, was 19 and his mother, Elizabeth Spencer, was 20. He married Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft in 1668, in Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1677, in Lawne's Creek Parish, Isle of Wight, Virginia, United States, at the age of 37, and was buried in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Hancock III est né en 1640, à Surry, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Hancock II, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Spencer, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft en 1668, à Norfolk, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1677, à Lawne's Creek Parish, Isle of Wight, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Hancock III 1640 in Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Hancock II 19 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Spencer 20. Er hat 1668 in Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1677 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Lawne's Creek Parish, Isle of Wight, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Hancock III è nato il nel 1640 nel Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, il suo padre, William Hancock II, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Spencer, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft nel 1668, nel Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1677, nel Lawne's Creek Parish, Isle of Wight, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: William Hancock IIIが1640年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州スリーで生まれた時，父William Hancock IIは19歳，母Elizabeth Spencerは20歳であった。1668年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ノーフォルクでElizabeth Burnett Cockcroftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1677年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州イスル オフ ウィトラウネ'ス クレエク パーイッシュで37歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Hancock III(이)가 1640년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 수리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Hancock II(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Spencer(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1668년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 노르폴크에서 Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1677년 미국 버지니아 주 이슬일 프 와이트 로니'스 크리크 파리시에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Hancock III nasceu em 1640, em Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Hancock II, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Spencer, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft em 1668, em Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1677, em Lawne's Creek Parish, Isle of Wight, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Hancock III родился в 1640 г. в местности сурри, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени William Hancock II было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Spencer, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft в 1668 г. в местности норфолк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1677 г. в местности лавне'с крик пэриш, исл оф ваит, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Hancock III nació en 1640, en Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, William Hancock II, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Spencer, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Burnett Cockcroft en 1668, en Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1677, en Lawne's Creek Parish, Isle of Wight, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.
